description.value: Aura strong universal; CL 20th; Slot ring; Price 120,000 gp; Weight â DESCRIPTION This ring is set with three rubies. Each ruby stores a wish spell, activated by the ring. When a wish is used, that ruby disappears. For a randomly generated ring, roll 1d3 to determine the remaining number of rubies. When all the wishes are used, the ring becomes a non-magical item. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Forge Ring; Spells miracle or wish; Cost 97,500 gp.
